project_summary: Requirements draft from 7 utterances (Client, PM) with 5 functional requirements, 0 non-functional requirements, 0 constraints, and 0 open questions.

functional_requirements.text: The app should allow users to schedule meetings.
Users should be able to create and update events.
Notifications should be sent to students when they join events.
Notifications should be sent to club leaders when they cancel events.
Ease of use should be considered for new users.

follow_up_questions: What acceptance criteria define success for the first release?

utterances.speaker: Client
utterances.text: Our school clubs need an app to publish weekly meeting schedules.

utterances.speaker: Client
utterances.text: Club leaders should create and update events.

utterances.speaker: Client
utterances.text: Students should join events and receive reminder notifications.

utterances.speaker: Client
utterances.text: It should be easy to use for freshmen.

utterances.speaker: Client
utterances.text: Maybe attendance analytics can be added later.

utterances.speaker: PM
utterances.text: Who is allowed to cancel events?

utterances.speaker: Client
utterances.text: Only club leaders and the student council should cancel events.
